title: Rewrite pushed history to strip Claude attribution trailers
summary: Rewrote pushed main history from the 2026-05-03 notification-planning commit through the current ADR commit to remove Claude attribution trailer lines from commit messages. The final tree is unchanged from the pre-rewrite backup ref; only commit message bodies and downstream hashes changed. A descriptive false-positive line in the prior attribution-disable commit was reworded so the exact trailer grep now returns zero.

history_rewrite.force_push_policy: push with --force-with-lease=main:e550c66975488c6c61423388c77ebad9a58c554f only; bare --force not used

validations_passed: git diff --quiet backup/app-history-strip-claude-trailers-20260521..HEAD (tree unchanged before metadata commit)
git log --since=2026-05-03 --pretty=%h %s | wc -l == 199 before metadata commit
validation_pending: force-push with lease and final mirror check after this metadata commit lands

contract_status_changes.before: Main history contained 84 actual Claude attribution trailer lines and one descriptive false-positive line that matched the trailer grep.
contract_status_changes.after: Rewritten main history contains zero lines matched by git log --grep=^Co-Authored-By: Claude and zero actual Claude attribution trailer/generated lines in current-branch commit messages.

not_claimed: No file content changes were made by the history rewrite itself.
Did not edit GitHub PR descriptions or any remote metadata outside git main.
Did not rewrite historical handoff/session records to update old SHA references.
residual_risks: Anyone with a clone based on the old main history must fetch and hard-reset/rebase onto the new origin/main before pushing.
Historical handoff JSON and SecondBrain entries that mention old SHAs are point-in-time records; those old SHAs will not resolve from a fresh clone after force-push.
A local backup ref remains until cleanup is explicitly desired: backup/app-history-strip-claude-trailers-20260521.
recommended_next_reason: Run supervisor after force-push; no adjacent queued slice was shown in this slice context.
